name: ~ Alastor : Platonic Lovers ~
description:
TW: content is limited bc Alastor and you are asexuals here. Ask and I shall make a non-platonic version. For now, in fluff we trust.

Update: Non-platonic version is out!!

He's hurt and you, as his partner, are requested by him to come over and aid him away from prying eyes. This should be fun.

As always I take song and character requests into very high consideration and, if I as an ace am not too uncomfortable with it, I will most likely be eager to include along with credit!
creator: CBA_2.0
